function solve(s) {
    const n = s.length;
    if (n === 0) return 0;
    
    // Compute prefix_L, prefix_C, prefix_T
    const prefix_L = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);
    const prefix_C = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);
    const prefix_T = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);
    
    for (let i = 1; i <= n; i++) {
        prefix_L[i] = prefix_L[i - 1] + (s[i - 1] === 'L' ? 1 : 0);
        prefix_C[i] = prefix_C[i - 1] + (s[i - 1] === 'C' ? 1 : 0);
        prefix_T[i] = prefix_T[i - 1] + (s[i - 1] === 'T' ? 1 : 0);
    }
    
    // Compute t_after array
    const t_after = new Array(n).fill(0);
    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        t_after[i] = prefix_T[n] - prefix_T[i + 1];
    }
    
    // Compute sum_c_t_after array
    const sum_c_t_after = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);
    for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        if (s[i] === 'C') {
            sum_c_t_after[i] = t_after[i] + sum_c_t_after[i + 1];
        } else {
            sum_c_t_after[i] = sum_c_t_after[i + 1];
        }
    }
    sum_c_t_after[n] = 0;
    
    // Compute original_count
    let original_count = 0;
    for (let j = 0; j < n; j++) {
        if (s[j] === 'C') {
            original_count += prefix_L[j] * t_after[j];
        }
    }
    
    // Compute max_insert_L
    let max_insert_L = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {
        max_insert_L = Math.max(max_insert_L, sum_c_t_after[i]);
    }
    
    // Compute max_insert_C
    let max_insert_C = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {
        const t = prefix_T[n] - prefix_T[i];
        const l = prefix_L[i];
        const current = l * t;
        if (current > max_insert_C) {
            max_insert_C = current;
        }
    }
    
    // Compute max_insert_T
    let max_insert_T = 0;
    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {
        const l = prefix_L[i];
        const c = prefix_C[i];
        const current = l * c;
        if (current > max_insert_T) {
            max_insert_T = current;
        }
    }
    
    const max_increase = Math.max(max_insert_L, max_insert_C, max_insert_T);
    return original_count + max_increase;
}

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

        } else {

            sum_C_T_after[i] = sum_C_T_after[i + 1];

    }

    // Compute sum_L_C_before

    const sum_L_C_before = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

        } else {

            sum_L_C_before[i + 1] = sum_L_C_before[i];

        }

    }

    // Compute original_count

    let original_count = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            original_count += prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i + 1];

        // insert 'T'

        temp = Math.max(temp, sum_L_C_before[pos]);

        if (temp > max_increase) {

            max_increase = temp;

        }

    }

    return original_count + max_increase;
